name: pcs-jira-task-builder
description: Beta. Reads pcs-promo-parser Stage 1 CSVs (from the Promo Parsed Output/ folder) and creates corresponding Jira Tasks in the PCS Promotions space. Hard PROM write-protection: always prompts for target project, requires literal-phrase confirmation to write to production. Defaults to PAT (test). Handles kit promos, NLPs, RSAs with manual review, per-vendor period naming (Milwaukee/DeWalt/Makita/Bosch/GearWrench P1-P2, EGO H1-H2, Flex Q1-Q4), auto-HERO detection, storefront link scaffolding, and PROM-style description templates. v0.2.0: also creates Tasks from the parser's new Other-Promotions.csv (Buy-More-Save-More / e-rebate / promo-code) with per-group review, BMSM/E-Rebate/Coupon labels, and the coupon-code title format; e-rebate/BMSM/promo-code are no longer Non-Included reasons; tolerates absent (empty) parser files using the always-present Parser-Audit manifest.
